# General Cannabis Care
## [The 5 Microskills Every Grower Eventually Learns](https://www.growweedeasy.com/the-5-microskills-every-grower-eventually-learns)
As a cannabis grower, you inevitably pick up "microskills" along the way, making it easier and easier to prevent problems and maximize harvests in the future. But you can gain the power of experience without learning the hard way. You just need to learn from other home growers who already walked the path. Plants grow
[Read more](https://www.growweedeasy.com/the-5-microskills-every-grower-eventually-learns)
## [Why Hydro Feels Like Cheating (Plus 7 Tips)](https://www.growweedeasy.com/7-secrets-no-problems-cannabis-hydroponic-dwc-cultivation)
I love almost every aspect of growing cannabis, but my least favorite part is testing the pH of runoff water (to prevent deficiencies). Enter hydroponics. In a "DWC" (deep water culture) hydro tub like this one, pH is the easiest part of growing. You just dip a PH Pen in the water, and you're done.
[Read more](https://www.growweedeasy.com/7-secrets-no-problems-cannabis-hydroponic-dwc-cultivation)

Start with Extraordinary Genetics What to Do: Start with the best seeds you can find. Good seeds germinate consistently and produce
[Read more](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-better-weed-at-home)

Increase Light Power = Bigger Buds Quick win: Move your light a few inches closer for the second half of the flowering stage (after

## [Best Soil Nutrients for Growing Marijuana?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/best-soil-nutrients-for-growing-cannabis)
Got marijuana plants growing in soil? Many nutrients made for hydroponics work in soil. But do you know what's way better? Using nutrients that were made specifically for growing cannabis in soil. Soil nutrients have cool, unique properties that you won't want to miss! Here are my top cannabis nutrient picks: Fox Farms Nutrient Trio

## [5 Steps to Give Cannabis Plants the Best Start](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-steps-to-give-cannabis-plants-the-best-start)
No-Move Germination - Plant seeds directly in final pot. 18/6 Light Schedule - Set timer to 18/6 ON/OFF Water Seedlings Right - In a small circle every 2-3 days Perfect Environment - Like a warm Spring day Measure Your Success - How big to expect seedlings to be Bonus: 7 Recommended Seeds for a Strong
[Read more](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-steps-to-give-cannabis-plants-the-best-start)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
